local_updates: Thunder sweep the Lakers and advance to the Western Conference Finals.
Watch-party traffic and downtown playoff energy continue despite no Game 5.
Shucked opens May 12 at Civic Center and runs through May 17.
OU Commencement ceremonies create Norman family traffic and hotel movement throughout the week.
OU Baseball vs Tennessee at Bricktown Ballpark adds Thu–Sat downtown traffic and parking pressure.
Anthony Jeselnik at Bricktown Comedy Club adds additional evening downtown movement May 14–16.
Calderón Dance Festival runs May 16 from 12 PM–8 PM at Myriad Botanical Gardens.
George Thorogood & The Destroyers with The Marshall Tucker Band hits Riverwind May 16 at 7 PM.
Riverwind continues Thunder watch-party activation during playoff momentum.
Ongoing construction (I-35, downtown) and mid-May storms continue adding friction.
